results.rendered_html: śiva—rātri f. ‘Śiva's night’, N. of a popular fast and festival in honour of Śiva (kept on the 14th of the dark half of the month Māgha or January-February with many solemn ceremonies, observed during the day and night, cf. śiva-caturdaśī),  Rājat. ;  RTL. 90 ; 428
